Title: Captain Tsubasa
Plot: Tsubasa Ozora is 11-year-old who dreams to become the world's best football player and win the World Cup, his thoughts and dreams revolve almost entirely around the joy of football. In order to pursue his dream, Tsubasa moves with his mother to Nankatsu, where he will need the best of his abilities to stand out. He encounters not only rivals, but also friends.
